overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a large eagle as it soars through a mountainous wilderness. The bird navigates from a narrow waterfall canyon through forested valleys and up to high alpine ridges with snow-capped peaks, showcasing detailed natural environments with realistic water and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with cascading waterfalls

agents.ego_description: large eagle gliding through the narrow canyon with wings fully extended, navigating between rocky walls and waterfalls

entered.detail: tall gray rock walls forming the canyon sides
multi-tiered waterfall cascading down the canyon face
deep blue pool at the base of the waterfall
scattered evergreen trees growing on canyon ledges

segments.scene_description: The eagle flies through a narrow rocky canyon, navigating between steep walls with a prominent waterfall cascading ahead. The environment is enclosed with limited sky visibility, featuring rocky surfaces and sparse vegetation clinging to the cliff faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river valley with winding waterway

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into the open river valley with expanded sky visibility

agents.ego_description: following the river course through the valley, flying steadily between stands of pine trees

entered.detail: clear mountain river flowing through the valley floor
grassy valley bottom with scattered boulders
rocky formations visible at the valley's end

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the eagle enters a wide forested valley with a clear river running through it. The space opens up to full sky visibility with grassy banks and scattered pine trees replacing the rocky enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff formations overlooking alpine lake

events.description: begins ascending and banking left to gain altitude over the red rock cliffs
snow-capped mountains become visible on the horizon as altitude increases

agents.ego_description: gaining altitude while circling above red rock cliffs, revealing an alpine lake below

entered.detail: distinctive reddish-brown rock formations with layered strata
large body of water nestled between mountain ridges
distant mountain peaks with snow cover visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The eagle ascends over dramatic red rock cliffs, revealing a stunning alpine lake below. As the bird gains altitude, snow-capped mountains emerge on the distant horizon, marking the transition to higher elevations.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude mountain ridge with expansive forest below

events.description: transitions to steady level flight over the mountain ridges

agents.ego_description: soaring high above the dense forest canopy with majestic snow-capped peaks dominating the background

entered.detail: dense carpet of evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes below
rocky ridge line extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: Flying at high altitude, the eagle traverses above a vast expanse of dense forest with snow-capped mountains filling the horizon. The terrain below is a mix of rocky outcrops and thick woodland stretching into the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal basin with colorful hot springs

events.description: approaching geothermal area with steaming hot springs and colorful mineral pools

agents.ego_description: descending slightly to survey the geothermal pools, flying over the steaming vents and colorful mineral deposits

entered.detail: colorful hot springs with turquoise water and orange mineral deposits
rising steam from geothermal activity in the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a geothermal basin with vibrant hot springs and steaming vents scattered across the rocky terrain. The eagle descends to survey the colorful mineral pools while the snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky gorge into a vast, high-altitude alpine wilderness. It begins deep within a narrow canyon, weaving between steep cliff faces and sparse vegetation as a prominent waterfall cascades ahead. As the eagle emerges from the rocky enclosure, the space opens up into a wide forested valley where the gray stone gives way to grassy banks, scattered pine trees, and a winding river under a clear sky. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends over dramatic red rock cliffs, revealing a shimmering alpine lake below. Finally, the perspective expands toward the distant horizon, where the landscape culminates in a vista of towering snow-capped mountains.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude wilderness into a vibrant geothermal basin. It begins with the eagle soaring above a vast expanse of dense forest and rocky outcrops, with snow-capped mountains dominating the misty horizon. As the bird glides forward, the perspective shifts from the wide woodland canopy toward a more concentrated area of rocky terrain. The scene then opens up to reveal a geothermal landscape, where the camera descends to survey steaming vents and colorful mineral pools. Finally, the view settles over the vibrant hot springs while the distant snowy peaks remain visible in the background.
